sectors.name: 반도체
key_drivers: AI 칩 수요 지속 급증 (데이터센터 CapEx 확대)
DRAM 가격 QoQ +90~95% 상승 전망 (2026 Q1)
risks: HBM 시장에서 SK하이닉스 대비 열위 (점유율 35% vs 50%)
파운드리 TSMC 대비 수율 격차 (71% vs 6.8% 시장점유율)
2026 하반기 공급 정상화로 가격 상승세 둔화 가능
AI ROI 우려 시 CapEx 조정 가능성

sources.title: DRAM/NAND Price Forecast Q1 2026
sources.original_text: TrendForce now expects conventional DRAM contract prices to rise by 90–95% quarter over quarter in 1Q26, a substantial upward revision from its previous estimate of 55–60%. NAND Flash contract prices are likewise projected to increase by 55–60% QoQ.

sources.title: SK Hynix Overtakes Samsung in Annual Profit
sources.original_text: SK Hynix surpassed Samsung in annual operating profit for the first time, posting 47.2 trillion won vs. Samsung's 43.6 trillion won for 2025... SK Hynix's dominance in HBM memory—specialized chips used in AI servers

sources.title: TSMC Foundry Market Share
sources.original_text: TSMC's Foundry Market Share Hits 71% in Q3... Samsung Electronics Falls to 6.8% Market Share, Down 0.5 Percentage Points from Previous Quarter

sectors.name: 에너지
key_drivers: OPEC+ 감산 해제로 2026년 공급 과잉 예상
AI 데이터센터 전력 수요 급증 (전력 인프라 섹터 수혜)
risks: 트럼프 행정부 정책 변화 (재생에너지 보조금 축소 가능)

samsung_relevance.note: 삼성SDI 배터리 사업 간접 연관, 삼성전자 직접 연관성 낮음

sources.title: Short-Term Energy Outlook (STEO)
sources.original_text: The EIA projected in this STEO that the WTI spot price will come in at $52.21 per barrel this year and $50.36 per barrel next year. The commodity averaged $65.40 per barrel in 2025.

sources.title: Bearish Oil Outlook
sources.original_text: Our balance sheet shows that the surplus in the oil market is set to grow in 2026, following OPEC+'s decision to unwind supply cuts at a quicker-than-expected pace.

sources.title: Renewables Outlook 2026
sources.original_text: Global solar and wind power generation is set to grow robustly this decade, led by rising demand and efforts to enhance energy security and competitiveness.

sources.title: Global Energy Investment 2025
sources.original_text: Global energy investment in 2025 is likely to have passed $3.3 trillion, with $2.2 trillion flowing into clean energy technologies.

sectors.name: 금융
key_drivers: 수익률 곡선 정상화로 은행 수익성 회복 기대
M&A 및 IPO 시장 활성화 전망 (투자은행 수혜)
risks: NIM(순이자마진) 압축 지속 - 2023년 피크 대비 하락
Basel III 규제 자본 요건 강화

samsung_relevance.note: 삼성전자와 직접 연관성 없음. 삼성생명/삼성화재는 별도

sources.title: Global Bank Outlook 2026
sources.original_text: Our 2026 global outlook for banks is stable, which reflects our expectation that creditworthiness will remain strong across the sector. Steady but subdued global growth and lower policy rates will underpin benign asset quality conditions.

sources.title: Global Banks Outlook 2026: Resilience Amid Uncertainty
sources.original_text: Our outlook for global banks remains steady with broad ratings stability anticipated in 2026.

sources.title: 2026 Banking and Capital Markets Outlook
sources.original_text: The year ahead will likely demand bold choices as banks balance macro headwinds, AI ambition, and the potential disruptive entrance of stablecoins.

sectors.name: 기술 (소프트웨어/클라우드)
key_drivers: 클라우드 시장 지속 성장 (AI 워크로드 확대)
risks: AI ROI 실현 지연 시 투자 조정

samsung_relevance.note: 삼성SDS 클라우드 사업, 삼성전자 메모리/SSD 수요 간접 수혜

sources.title: Hyperscaler CapEx Outlook
sources.original_text: Analysts project that combined CapEx for the major hyperscalers will exceed $200 billion in 2025, a significant increase from 2024 levels.

sources.title: 2026 Renewable Energy Industry Outlook
sources.original_text: US electricity demand growth will at least quadruple in 2026, driven by AI data centers and the electrification of the economy.

sources.title: OLED Monitor Shipments Surge 64%
sources.original_text: Global OLED monitor shipments reached approximately 3.2 million units in 2025, a 64% year-on-year increase from 1.95 million units in 2024. Growth exceeding 50% is forecast for 2026.

sources.title: Smartphone Shipments Outlook
sources.original_text: Global smartphone shipments are now expected to decline 0.9 percent in 2026, compared to the previous forecast of 1.2 percent growth.

sources.title: OLED Smartphone Panel Shipments
sources.original_text: The market will reach over 1 billion panels in the first time in 2026. Foldable OLED shipments will grow 27% and reach 38 million.

key_themes: AI 인프라 투자가 반도체/클라우드 섹터 견인
에너지 섹터 내 전통 vs 재생에너지 차별화
금융 섹터 금리 정상화 수혜 기대
소비자 전자제품 시장 성숙으로 성장 둔화

samsung_investment_view.rationale: 메모리 슈퍼사이클로 단기 실적 강세, 그러나 HBM·파운드리 구조적 열위
